title: Asset Registry
description: Catalogue of all assets in a project. Written by the cook step, read by the editor and engine. A stable GUID identifies each asset across renames.

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the last cook run.

id.description: Stable UUID v4 identifier. Never changes even if the asset is renamed.

type.description: Asset type tag used for filtering and loading.

source.description: Relative path to the source asset file (e.g. Content/Textures/Grass.png).

cooked.description: Relative path to the cooked/runtime-ready asset (generated by cook step).

hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the source file at last cook time.

name.description: Human-readable asset name (usually the file stem).

dependencies.description: GUIDs of assets that this asset depends on.

importSettings.description: Per-asset import parameters set in the editor (type-specific).
